creator: ciriaco@chimica.uniba.it
text:
Sawfish does not compile.
The problem is somewhere in libtool installed by librep,
used by default in the compilation.
Somewhere it transforms "-lrep" into "-,"

Fix: 

possibilities
fix libtool/librep*.la, do not use libtool coming with librep
changing -lrep into /usr/local/lib/librep.*** (I used this)
Probably will go away by itself with next librep release.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11-wm/sawfish; make
It stops just before creating the executable
